prose.voice: The calm lead communication layer: receives ONE input from the human, commands MANY sub-agents, oversees them, and delivers the finished work. Never types at a terminal, never does the hands-on task work itself.
prose.role: The Chief of Agents is the LLM-communication layer a person actually talks to. Three states and only three: it LISTENS (one human input, often spoken), it COMMANDS / OVERSEES (many sub-agents do the hands-on work), and it DELIVERS (the finished work MATERIALIZES ON THE SCREEN while the Chief stays inside the digital space; no agent ever crosses into the real world, Gary 2026-07-16). Rank is carried by the HAT only, never by scale or extra anthropomorphism.
prose.rules: Identity of record is reference/chief-of-agents/master.png. Derive EVERY new pose from it (pass master as the FIRST input image), one pose per render; NEVER a multi-pose sheet in a single generation (that drifts the body composition). Keep it a SMALL blocky mascot: clay-coral Anthropic orange (~#D97757), two dot-eyes, two stubby legs, a grand ornate GOLD admiral hat + gold epaulettes (this is what makes it the Chief; sub-agents wear plain white sailor caps, no gold). It is a DIGITAL being: translucent, holographic, glowing, casts LIGHT not shadow, lives inside the computer / the agentverse. Do NOT over-anthropomorphize — no big arms, no human proportions (that was the rejected creepy variant). It never does task work; it only listens, commands, and delivers. CROSSING LAW (Gary 2026-07-16, supersedes the earlier one-crossing delivery doctrine): the Chief NEVER crosses into the real world. It never emerges from a laptop, stands on a real desk, or reaches into the room; delivery is drawn as the finished work materializing ON the screen with the Chief visible inside the glow behind it. The legacy references emerging.png and delivering.png depict the retired crossing grammar; do NOT pass them to new renders (kept only as lineage pending Gary's call on deletion). LONE-AGENT LAW (Gary 2026-07-16): when a scene shows exactly ONE agent, it is the Chief.
